scenarios.description: child(0) with non-null shadowChildrenRef whose referent has been cleared triggers rebuild and returns element
scenarios.precondition: Element has one Element child and private shadowChildrenRef set to a cleared WeakReference
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the child element and shadowChildrenRef is reset to a new non-null referent
pseudocode: TEST TC14 child rebuilds cache when weakref referent is null
// Arrange: create parent and one child, build initial cache
// Reflectively clear the referent of shadowChildrenRef
// Act: call child(0), should rebuild the cache
// Assert: returned element is the original child and cache referent is non-null
